loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing active power, apparent power, and active energy — reactive energy is not measured by this asset (no dedicated reactive energy column logged), so active energy is shown as the sole energy metric.

loop1.title: Current Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase and neutral current trends; high/low current thresholds are omitted because the asset's rated current is unknown.
